01 · Welcome

Let's build
something
great.

We're glad to have OrganicSmith on board. This starter kit contains everything you need to understand your solution, complete onboarding, and launch as quickly as possible.

"Ubuntu — I am because we are. Your growth is our growth, and your community's access to healthcare is what drives everything we build."

MgucaTech Solutions is a South African technology company built on the belief that affordable, accessible tools can bridge the gap between organisations and the communities they serve.

02 · Your Approved Solution

What you're
getting.

💬
WhatsApp Chatbot

AI-powered conversational assistant on the channel your patients already trust — no app download required.

  • Automated patient responses
  • Smart FAQ handling
  • Human handoff routing
  • Operating hours awareness
  • Branded conversation flows
📅
Booking Workflow

End-to-end appointment booking directly through WhatsApp — reduce no-shows and free up reception time.

  • Real-time slot availability
  • Automated confirmations
  • Reminder messages
  • Cancellation handling
  • Capacity management
🖥️
Client Portal

Your centralised management dashboard — monitor bookings, conversations, performance metrics, and team activity.

  • Live booking dashboard
  • Conversation history
  • Team management tools
  • Performance analytics
  • Content management
Primary Goal
Increase customers & patient access

Starter
Launch Timing

Starter Package
03 · Onboarding Checklist

Five steps
to launch.

1
Sign in & Confirm Company Details

Log into the client portal and verify that all your business information, contact details, and practice profile are accurate.

Action Required
2
Share Brand & Content Assets

Provide your brand guidelines, FAQ document, pricing information, booking rules, and support content to customise your chatbot.

Action Required
3
Confirm Handoff & Operating Hours

Identify who will handle escalated human conversations and define your practice's operating hours for automated responses.

Action Required
4
Approve First Workflow Before Launch

Review and sign off on the initial chatbot flow or portal configuration before we go live. Your approval is required.

Approval Needed
5
Post-Launch Review

Attend the review session 14 days after launch to measure usage, assess handoff quality, and approve any improvements.

Scheduled
Content Needed
What to prepare

Logo & brand colours, FAQ document, service/pricing list, booking rules (times, slots, capacity), support contact details, and your practice's tone of voice.

System Access
What we'll need

Access to your existing booking system (if any), the WhatsApp Business number you'd like to use, and a designated admin contact for the portal.

💡 Tip
Speed = Success

The faster you complete steps 1–3, the sooner we can build and launch. Most clients who share content within the first week are live within 10 days.
